steps.title: Identify the subject matter contrast
steps.content: The question asks to contrast subject matter. The notes provide this contrast: Tana's print features “an explicitly political point of view (a Xhosa warrior fighting British colonial rule),” while Andrews's depicts “a tranquil, everyday scene (a spring day in a city park).”

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly presents the subject matter contrast: “Tana's print expresses an explicitly political point of view, while Andrews's depicts a tranquil, everyday scene.”

The other three choices either mishandle the technical terms—A and D treat linocut and relief print as different when the notes clarify linocutting is a type of relief printing—or focus on dates rather than subject matter (C).

This matches choice B — B is correct.
